title: helianthemum stipulare
intro: Helianthemum stipulare, also known as Rockrose, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. The medicinal properties of Helianthemum stipulare include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral agent, making it useful for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Rockrose include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate stress and anxiety, and support the immune system, as well as its ability to exhibit antioxidant properties. Helianthemum stipulare can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and potential interactions.
